name: Statsig
description: Drive Statsig (feature flags + experiments + analytics) from any AI agent: evaluate gates/dynamic configs/experiments, log events, manage console-side gates and experiments. 10 tools, server-secret-key auth.
instructions:
This connector uses the Statsig HTTP API (docs.statsig.com).

**Two distinct APIs**:
  - **Server SDK API** (`api.statsig.com/v1/...`) — runtime evaluation + event logging. Requires `STATSIG_SERVER_SECRET_KEY` (starts with `secret-`).
  - **Console API** (`statsigapi.net/console/v1/...`) — admin operations like creating gates. Requires `STATSIG_CONSOLE_API_KEY` (starts with `console-`).
The adapter uses the Server SDK base by default; tools that hit the Console API set explicit absolute URLs in their endpointMapping.

**Setup**:
1. Sign in to https://console.statsig.com → **Settings → Keys & Environments**.
2. Copy the **Server Secret Key** (`secret-...`) for runtime ops.
3. Copy a **Console API Key** (`console-...`) for admin ops (Settings → Project Settings → API Keys → Create Console API Key).
4. Set `STATSIG_SERVER_SECRET_KEY` and (optionally, for admin tools) `STATSIG_CONSOLE_API_KEY`.

**Authentication**: Server SDK uses `statsig-api-key: ${SERVER_SECRET}` header. Console uses `STATSIG-API-KEY: ${CONSOLE_KEY}` header.

**Statsig-Client-Time header**: server SDK endpoints prefer a `STATSIG-CLIENT-TIME` header (Unix ms) — Statsig uses for evaluation timing. Skip for simple cases.

**User object**: every gate/config/experiment evaluation needs a `user` object with at minimum `userID` (your stable user ID). Add `email`, `country`, `appVersion`, `custom` for targeting accuracy.

**Out of scope here**: Layers API (experiment layers), holdouts, GitHub integration, audit log, project membership management.

tools.name: statsig_check_gate
tools.description: Evaluate a feature gate (boolean flag) for a user. Returns {name, value:bool, rule_id, group_name, secondary_exposures}.

user.description: {userID, email?, country?, ip?, userAgent?, appVersion?, custom?:{}, customIDs?:{}, privateAttributes?:{}}.

tools.name: statsig_get_config
tools.description: Evaluate a Dynamic Config for a user. Returns {name, value:{...}, rule_id, group_name}.

tools.name: statsig_get_experiment
tools.description: Evaluate an experiment for a user. Returns variant assignment + dynamic-config-like value object.

tools.name: statsig_initialize
tools.description: Bulk evaluate ALL gates/configs/experiments for a user in one call. Returns the complete state — useful for client bootstrap.

tools.name: statsig_log_event
tools.description: Log a custom event for analytics + experiment exposure tracking. Events are async — Statsig buffers them.

events.description: [{user, eventName, value?, metadata?, time? (Unix ms)}]. Batch many at once.

tools.name: statsig_list_gates
tools.description: Console: list feature gates defined in the project. Requires CONSOLE API key (set STATSIG_CONSOLE_API_KEY).

tools.name: statsig_get_gate_config
tools.description: Console: fetch a gate's definition (rules, targeting). Requires CONSOLE key.

tools.name: statsig_create_gate
tools.description: Console: create a new feature gate. Requires CONSOLE key.

tools.name: statsig_list_experiments
tools.description: Console: list experiments. Requires CONSOLE key.

tools.name: statsig_get_experiment_results
tools.description: Console: fetch experiment metric results (pulse readout). Requires CONSOLE key.
